title: Auto glass claims
text: Northstar Mutual auto glass claims must be reported through the Aurora portal within 30 calendar days. Windshield repair has a 75 dollar deductible. A police report is not required.

title: Travel interruption claims
text: Trip interruption claims use form T-19 and supporting receipts must arrive within 45 calendar days. The reimbursement limit is 3,500 dollars per covered traveler.

title: Residential flood coverage
text: New residential flood coverage starts after a 14 calendar day waiting period. The waiting period is waived only when coverage is required at a mortgage closing.

title: Behavioral health telemedicine
text: In-network behavioral health telemedicine visits do not require a referral. The member copay is 15 dollars per visit and the annual visit count is unlimited.

title: Specialty pharmacy delivery
text: Cold-chain specialty medicines ship only on Tuesday and Thursday. A missed delivery must be rescheduled by calling the specialty pharmacy before 4 PM local time.

title: Approved claim settlement
text: Approved domestic claims paid by ACH settle within 2 business days. International claim wires settle within 5 business days and may incur an intermediary bank fee.

title: Merchant chargeback evidence
text: Merchants must submit chargeback evidence within 7 calendar days of notification. Evidence is uploaded as a PDF under 10 MB in the Disputes console.

title: Production emergency access
text: The production break-glass procedure is code-named Cobalt-17. It requires approval from two on-call managers and the resulting credentials expire after 60 minutes.

title: Claims API idempotency
text: Claims API clients send the Idempotency-Key header on create requests. Keys remain valid for a 24 hour replay window. Reusing a key with a different payload returns HTTP 409.

title: Records retention
text: Closed claim records are retained for 7 years after closure. Customer support chat transcripts are retained for 18 months after the conversation date.

title: Priority one support
text: A priority one incident must be acknowledged within 15 minutes. If unresolved after 30 minutes, route NORTHSTAR-P1 pages the incident commander.

title: European data residency
text: European customer data is stored primarily in Frankfurt with failover in Dublin. Encrypted backups never leave the European Economic Area.
